commands.review_summary:
The PR guards plugin metadata snapshot freezing, owner-map construction, and registry-id normalization against throwing manifest metadata fields and adds a poisoned-owner regression test.

PR surface: Source +211, Tests +65. Total +276 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main uses direct Object.values/Object.entries and direct manifest field reads in the snapshot freeze and owner-map paths, so throwing metadata accessors can abort before healthy rows are processed. I did not run Vitest because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This maintainer-labeled draft needs owner validation and completed regression proof rather than an automated repair PR.
